deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated 5/29/26. Sellers moving back in to make repairs and updates. Plan to relist later. VA loan at 5.25%. Underwater by $93K-$143K. Short sale considered previously.
deals.next: Await contact from sellers when ready to relist

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers relocating into property to complete updates.
Chandler laid off. Short sale path discussed. Relationship intact despite challenges.
Market analysis complete. Three paths presented: short sale, VA assumption, or price reduction with cash to close.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Listed 5/14/26 at $259,900. Relocating to North Carolina. Multiple interested buyers. Second-look buyers are strongest lead. Pre-inspection completed. Roof claim moving forward.
deals.next: Confirm showing time for second-look buyers. Monitor for offers.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back. Their favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Follow-up pending.
Investor cash offer at $176,300 discussed. Four showings total.
MLS live. First showing received. Canvassed neighborhood.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Divorce listing. 3BR/2BA on 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K. Recommended list price $295,000. CMA pulled. NET sheet built. Thin market with only 3 comps in 10 miles.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage. Schedule photos. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 (Feb 2026). CMA completed. Net sheet built.
Prior clients. Going through divorce. Colton looking for contractor work at 181 CR 7751.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale. Closed 4/27/26 for $152,000 cash. Lien blocker resolved. Military buyer via Sam VanDenheuvel.
deals.next: Joy gift delivery pending. Thank Sam and Michael (notary).

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Estate transaction complete.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release. Delivered to Chicago Title.
Lien holder contacted. Fabian Cerrillo cooperative. Path forward identified.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Cleanup nearly complete. Drywall done. Paint finishing. Flooring starting this week. Electric reconnected. Water meter pending. Cameras installed and covered.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD. Confirm meter installation timeline. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement.

logs.m: Electricians reconnected. Drywall complete. Paint finishing. Flooring starts tomorrow. Water meter 1-2 days out.
Drywall crew actively patching. Photos sent to Kelly. Kelly got mileage approved.
Work officially started. Matt Toney/San Antonio Remodelers dropping dumpsters.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: Land sale 20 acres. Contract at $113,000 with Espinoza buyers. Buyer agent is Javier. TXR 1903 amendment sent. EMD pending. Steve signed T-47 amendment via DocuSign.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed amendment back from Javier. Verify buyer email domain.

logs.m: Steve called back. Alejandra sent new T-47 via DocuSign. Steve signed and returned.
New qualified buyers: Espinoza family. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. EMD not yet received.
Steve signed price reduction amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked in.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Out of Corpus Christi deal. Pivoting to new construction with no HOA requirement. Previously approved ~$122K. Rental being sold. Rate buydowns and builder incentives are key leverage points.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach. Follow up on new construction search platform engagement.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Too much for them. Actively searching new construction instead.
Wholesale deal 301 W Saxet brought by Isaac. FHA 203k financing angle explored with Zach.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Helping with Green Bliss rental setup (uncle's property). Mom (Milagros Stringer) is new construction buyer. Grace Gardens Lennar community focus. Buyer rep sent to Milagros.
leads.next: Confirm Milagros buyer rep signature. Coordinate builder visit with both Brandon and mom. Register as agent on first visit.

logs.m: Jimbo backed out of rental. Chris sent $500 to cover costs. Skyslope listing cleared.
Milagros buyer rep sent. Builder options pulled. New construction search angle activated.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife (VA Buyer)
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military from Ohio. Recently moved to San Antonio area. Currently renting. Looking to purchase with VA loan benefits.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info on next 181 CR site visit. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA lender.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation caught up on May 11. Full details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and property they want.

leads.title: Armando (Employee Buyer)
leads.detail: Referred by David Roth. Employee buyer program. $50K down target. ~$1,000/month payment goal. Not locked to specific builder. May have no aging commissions with employee incentives.
leads.next: Get Armando contact from David Roth. Pull multi-builder options. Run incentive math.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing story with plants. Potential content collaboration. Trust-based real estate opportunity. No rush timeline.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission for story content.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor's Son
leads.detail: Inherited property behind Miss Pat (neighbor). Deceased owner was avid gardener. Son is new owner. No contact made yet. Garden community angle is natural warm intro.
leads.next: Get son's name and contact from Miss Pat. Reach out with empathy angle.

leads.title: Isaac (Investor)
leads.detail: Met in person. Investor interested in Schertz area. Buy box unknown. Full intake call still needed.
leads.next: Full Sage intake. Understand buy box, budget, timeline, flip vs hold strategy.

leads.title: Jahsia
leads.detail: Age 18 finishing senior year. Referred by Julie (veteran buyer). Interested in getting into real estate. eXp path potential.
leads.next: Get contact info from Julie. Follow up on Skool website check-in sent.

leads.title: Kurt (Neighbor)
leads.detail: Neighbor around 9815 Conbes area. Watching nearby listing under contract at $275,000. Wants intel on offers. May be seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt's area. Determine if he is seller, buyer, or just curious.

priorities.title: Confirm pre-approval & start showings
priorities.notes: Out of Corpus deal. New construction search active. Confirm Zach pre-approval status. Pull multi-builder inventory matching $50K down/$1K payment target.

followUps.text: Call Zach Schaphorst re: pre-approval status
Pull new construction inventory from DR Horton, MI Homes, Lennar, other builders
Send builder options to Mike and Alice

priorities.title: Coordinate builder visit with Brandon and Milagros
priorities.notes: New construction buyer (Milagros) + referral source (Brandon). Buyer rep sent but not yet signed. Critical to register as agent on first builder visit.

followUps.text: Confirm Milagros buyer rep signature status
Text Brandon to confirm Wed/Thu builder visit with him and mom
Call Carlos McLean at Lennar before visit to register agent

priorities.title: Push 181 CR 7751 to listing completion
priorities.notes: Cleanup nearly complete. Electric done. Flooring this week. Water meter 1-2 days out. Submit listing agreement to bank. Establish list price and timeline.

followUps.text: Call Medina Electric (866-632-3532) for meter install timeline
Call EMCSUD (830-709-3879) for water service confirmation
Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham
Establish asking price once all work complete

priorities.title: Get Colton Brown listing live
priorities.notes: Divorce listing. CMA done. Net sheet built. Payoff confirmed. Need updated payoff letter, confirm acreage, schedule photos, get agreement signed. Thin market (3 comps in 10 miles).

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing
Confirm acreage on property (4.05 AC noted, verify impact on pricing)

priorities.title: Follow up on active showings & offers
priorities.notes: Mill Path: second-look buyers are strongest lead. Tilden land: EMD pending, amendment awaiting signature. Both need active monitoring and follow-up.

followUps.text: Confirm showing time for second-look buyers at Mill Path (5/30)
Follow up with agent after showing feedback
Confirm EMD received on Tilden land contract
Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier
